title: Output cone select appears to no longer work on blackboxes?
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Download [stub.v](https://gist.github.com/litghost/83ee196a7eb529138fba5bf43376822a)
2. Run:
```
yosys -p "cd STUB; select IN %co*; ls" stub.v
```

## Expected behavior

Select statement should report connected wires from IN wires (which worked at rev: f84a84e3f1a27b361c21fcd30fcf50c1a6586629 )

```
Yosys 0.8+332 (git sha1 fb7f02be, clang 4.0.1-10 -fPIC -Os)

-- Parsing `stub.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `stub.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\STUB'.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

-- Running command `cd STUB; select IN %co*; ls' --

2 wires:
  IN
  OUT

End of script. Logfile hash: 9863935eae
CPU: user 0.01s system 0.00s, MEM: 40.72 MB total, 6.68 MB resident
Yosys 0.8+331 (git sha1 f84a84e3, clang 4.0.1-10 -fPIC -Os)
Time spent: 49% 1x select (0 sec), 44% 1x read_verilog (0 sec), ...
```

## Actual behavior

Select statement no longer finds connected wires (as of fb7f02be5561ccfd5bee5f3235fbbae5ef618f36 and later)

```
 Yosys 0.8+332 (git sha1 fb7f02be, clang 4.0.1-10 -fPIC -Os)


-- Parsing `stub.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend.
Parsing Verilog input from `stub.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\STUB'.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

-- Running command `cd STUB; select IN %co*; ls' --

1 wires:
  IN

End of script. Logfile hash: 53919bc75e
CPU: user 0.00s system 0.00s, MEM: 40.73 MB total, 6.60 MB resident
Yosys 0.8+332 (git sha1 fb7f02be, clang 4.0.1-10 -fPIC -Os)
Time spent: 51% 1x select (0 sec), 42% 1x read_verilog (0 sec), ...
```
